doc_title_en: Notice of Correction (Increase) to Forecast Period-End Dividend for Fiscal Year Ending May 2026

key_facts.reason_jp: 業績動向、財政状態及び資本効率を総合勘案。配当性向30%以上維持、自己資本比率水準維持方針の下、継続的な株主還元の充実。

summary_en: FY5/26 final dividend raised to ¥37/share from ¥27/share forecast; combined with interim ¥11/share, full-year dividend ¥48/share. Payout ratio maintained at 30%+ under mid-term plan capital allocation framework.
summary_jp: FY5/26期末配当を予想27円から37円に修正。中間配当11円と合わせ通期48円。配当性向30%以上を維持方針。
tag_jp: 配当増配 - 1株37円（前回27円）- FY5/26通期48円
